Explanation: This report demonstrates strong technical writing and clear methodology for analyzing chromatographic data with missing process parameters. The three-step workflow is well-structured, and the authors effectively acknowledge data limitations and adapt their analysis accordingly. The use of USP §621 standards and appropriate statistical techniques (ALS baseline correction, outlier detection) shows scientific awareness. Visuals (Figures 1-4) effectively display binned density plots with red overlays highlighting abnormal peaks. However, the analysis has limitations: the report identifies tailing peaks but provides limited mechanistic insight into root causes; the "0 Abnormal Peaks Detected" notation in figure titles contradicts the narrative discussion of red-flagged regions; quantitative summary statistics for tailing/fronting factors are absent from the results section. The originality is moderate—applying standard chromatographic techniques to a specific dataset without novel methodological innovations. The code appendix adds reproducibility value. More detailed quantitative results (actual Tf/Ff values, threshold exceedances) and deeper investigation of the anomalies would strengthen the analysis.
